Henry

Skilled, pre-trained & ready for work.

Henry handles core IT work and shows value within days after deployment.

Skill

Distribution list management

Adds or removes people from existing email distribution lists like Google Groups and DLs.

Skill

App access management

Grants or removes user access to applications based on policy.

Skill

Ticket requestor enrichment

Adds relevant employee details to tickets to give better context and resolve issues faster.

Skill

Employee IT onboarding

Provisions all required IT access, accounts, and equipment for new employees.

Skill

Microsoft 365 license cleanup

Automatically reclaims Microsoft 365 licenses from inactive users.

Skill

Active directory password reset

Handle Active Directory password resets for locked out or forgotten passwords.

Skill

Temporary admin access

Safely grants and revokes temporary admin access.

Skill

Computer troubleshooting

Diagnoses and resolves common employee hardware and software issues using FleetDM.

Meet Henry

How it works

AI that learns from real IT work.

Co-Pilot

Text to resolution

Henry works alongside your IT team to execute ticket actions using natural language.

Your team describes the task. Henry performs the actions directly inside your existing systems.

Resolve tickets in minutes, not days.

Learning

Turns real IT work into skills.

As your team resolves tickets, Henry captures the actions and decisions taken.

Each resolution is stored as a reusable skill and applied consistently the next time it’s needed.

Nothing is lost. Resolutions are stored as skills and run as agents.

Agentic Automation

Skills run autonomously, under policy.

Once skills are proven, Henry runs them automatically. Each skill executes with policies, approvals, and permissions enforced by default.

Henry knows when to act, when to request approval, and when to escalate to a human.

Autonomy with human control built in.

Helpdesk

Turn 100 forms into one conversation.

Henry meets employees where they already work — Slack and Teams.

Questions are answered from your company’s knowledge and policies.

When required, Henry executes actions and updates your ITSM automatically.

#it_henry_helpdesk

Guido Scorza

Hey, I’m getting a permission denied error from GitHub when I try to push to the repo.

Henry

Hi, let me take a look at the policy for that repo... According to the Access Policy, only members of the Backend Engineering group can push to this repo.

Guido Scorza

I should be in that group, I just changed roles last week.

Henry

Got it. Since this needs a group membership review, I’ll escalate it to the IT team.
